description: Use this API to remove a 3-winding transformer device model attached to the specified 3-winding transformer. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = cct3wtdmod_remove(ibus, jbus, kbus, id)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: From bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: To bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: kbus
parameters.description: Third bus number. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: no 3-winding transformer device model on this branch.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
